headlines.description: Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak continued his rich vein of form with another goal on Saturday to help his side beat injury-hit Tottenham 2-1 in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Isak scores again as Newcastle beat Spurs

headlines.description: Substitute David Brooks scored a superb volley to secure a deserved victory for hosts Bournemouth as they beat Everton 1-0 in their Premier League fixture at the Vitality Stadium on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bournemouth beat Everton as good form continues

headlines.description: Leon Bailey scored the winner in Aston Villa's 2-1 Premier League victory over Leicester City, after Stephy Mavididi's equaliser had cancelled out Ross Barkley's strike in an action-packed second half on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bailey nets winner as Aston Villa edge Leicester

headlines.description: Crystal Palace scored a late equaliser to leave Chelsea winless in four Premier League games as Jean-Philippe Mateta struck in the 82nd minute to cancel out Cole Palmer's first-half opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea's winless run hits 4 as Palace score late

events.name: West Ham United at Manchester City

headlines.description: Manchester City thrashed West Ham United 4-1 in the Premier League on Saturday for their first back-to-back wins since October thanks to two goals from Erling Haaland and one of their best all-around performances in weeks.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland double helps Man City to resounding win

headlines.description: Brentford thrashed relegation favourites Southampton 5-0 on Saturday to chalk up a long-overdue first away win of the Premier League season, helped by a double from Bryan Mbeumo.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brentford earn first away win of season vs So'ton

headlines.description: An early goal from Arsenal teenager Ethan Nwaneri was cancelled out by a penalty from Joao Pedro as Brighton & Hove Albion held the misfiring Gunners to a 1-1 Premier League draw on Saturday that dented the visitors' title hopes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal's title hopes dealt blow in Brighton draw
